function: () => { const container = document.querySelector('.app-container[data-card-order-key]'); const cards = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll('[data-card-id]')); const initialOrder = cards.map(c => c.id); const firstCard = cards[0]; const thirdCard = cards[2]; const initialIndex = Array.from(container.children).indexOf(firstCard); const targetIndex = Array.from(container.children).indexOf(thirdCard); container.insertBefore(firstCard, thirdCard); const inst = container.__sortableCardInstance; if (inst && typeof inst.options.onEnd === 'function') { inst.options.onEnd({ item: firstCard, oldIndex: initialIndex, newIndex: targetIndex, to: container }); } const finalCards = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll('[data-card-id]')); const finalOrder = finalCards.map(c => c.id); const stored = (() => { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('puffco:card-order')); } catch { return null; } })(); return { initialOrder, finalOrder, stored, reorderWorked: initialOrder[0] !== finalOrder[0] }; }
